step.name: Execute: hero banner displays correct promotion
Execute: navigation menu all links work
Execute: search bar visible and functional

step.name: Execute: sort by price low to high works

failure.message: AssertionError: Element not found within timeout

step.name: Execute: pagination navigates to next page
